understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` to win each level while avoiding spikes (`u`/`v`) and respecting the per-attempt turn budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is purely horizontal (MOVE_LEFT / MOVE_RIGHT); after each move gravity pulls the player in the current direction until a solid tile, hazard, or goal is hit. CLICK removes breakable blocks (`x`) at the given coordinates. Two attempts of 50 turns each are allowed per level; failing restarts the level. UNDO can revert prior actions for recovery.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` to win each level while avoiding spikes (`u`/`v`) and respecting the per-attempt turn budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is purely horizontal (MOVE_LEFT / MOVE_RIGHT); after each move gravity pulls the player in the current direction until a solid tile, hazard, or goal is hit.
